title: fire of water
description: welcome to my fun and wacky mod that you can enjoy.
body:
the mod is in bata so please backup your worlds this mod adds a two wood sets, two ore sets, two armor sets, a multi-tool and some other tools, one sword, two biomes, two dimensions and a structure. if thare is anyone issue please report them. anyway enjoy the mod.


versions 2.2.3 or higher will need tarrablender 
https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender

 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K8sHNs3qWVM&t=45s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K8sHNs3qWVM&t=45s)
